reviews.text:
We are  incredibly thankful to Victoria and Chris and their team at the Vernon Litigation Group for their exceptional work on our estate case. We were up against a tough situation: poorly drafted estate documents and a family member challenging our mother’s clear intentions. It felt like an uphill battle, and honestly, we didn’t think we had a chance. But Victoria, along with her senior lawyer Chris, paralegal Nicole, and admininistrator, Pamela, turned everything around with their amazing skill and dedication.

We’ll be honest—we weren’t the easiest clients. We frequently offered our own opinions on how to handle the case and even suggested how they should ask questions in court. Despite our challenging behavior, the team handled us with remarkable patience and professionalism. They took the time to listen to our concerns, explained their approach in a way we could understand, and guided us through the process with skill and care.

From start to finish, Victoria’s expertise in estate law shone through. She and her team tackled the complexities of our case with determination, building a strong argument to reform the estate trust. Chris provided critical guidance, while Nicole and Pamela kept us supported and informed every step of the way. Beyond their legal talent, they showed real compassion, understanding how much this meant to our family.

Against all odds, they delivered an outcome that exceeded our expectations. If you’re facing a complicated estate issue, we wholeheartedly recommend the Vernon Litigation Group. They’re not only brilliant at what they do—they’re compassionate professionals who can manage even the most difficult clients (like us) while still achieving amazing results. Thank you, Victoria, Chris, Nicole, and Pamela, for your dedication, patience, and everything you did for our family!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words. The team deeply appreciates your trust and partnership throughout the process. We’re so glad we could help bring clarity and resolution during a difficult time.

reviews.text: Called this attorney for a Buisness issue to get his professional opinion and he was tremendously helpful! Look forward to working with his team in the future.

“We found a home that was to our liking, made an offer and it was accepted. We did this without an attorney because we were told that “You don’t need attorneys in Florida to purchase a home.” We are from a state where an attorney is present, so to the uninformed, this transaction seemed to be a much easier process than what we need to endure back home.

To put a long story shorter, after the contract was signed, there was a disagreement between us and the Seller, and it snow balled into a legal situation where we needed a Real Estate Litigation attorney. We contacted the offices of the Vernon Litigation Group in Naples, Florida. We spoke with Miss Pam Tidwell, the Client Relationship Director, for the company. She was extremely gracious and respectful while she listened to our
concerns. She immediately understood the seriousness of our situation and immediately set up a time that same day for my wife and I to speak with Mr. Chris Vernon, the owner and Litigation Attorney for the company.

Mr. Chris spent 20 minutes providing an insight into how litigation worked with our case and detailed some of the pitfalls that may come our way if the litigation went on or was not successful. He was very professional and his honesty explaining some of the bad things that can happen in litigation was an eye-opening experience for us. When he answered all our questions, we thanked him for his time.

We were expecting that at the end of our conversation, he would tell us what his charge was, but this did not happen. Instead, he encouraged us not to go down the litigation route if possible and offered his services if we had no choice but to litigate. In my 72
years on being on this planet, I have never met an attorney willing to share information and their wisdom without demanding payment first. Mr. Chris was extremely kind to my wife and I, and it seemed he quickly recognized how scared we were and tried to calm our fears.

I don’t know where our situation is going to end, hopefully not in litigation, but we consider ourselves very fortunate to have met him---he is ethical, genuine, and one of a kind. We highly recommend him and his company’ s services.”
Had a great experience with Chris Vernon. Him and his team are very diligent and hardworking and dedicated to helping their clients. Strongly recommend.

Mr. Ellis –
Thank you for reaching out about your 2017 work injury. You may not recall, but you terminated our services in that claim in 2019 and then went on to negotiate and settle your claim on your own several months after our withdrawal. Settlements in Florida workers’ compensation are always voluntary, they cannot be forced by the Court or any party. The Court order approving your settlement “pro se” (meaning without counsel) can be found by clicking this link: https://www.jcc.state.fl.us/JCC/searchJCC/case.asp?CaseID=860451&caseYr=18&caseNum=028330

We wish you the best.
-Catherine Little-Hunt, President of HLH Law Group

I have to say, Mrs. Orange professionalism is the reason I had to leave a review. I usually don't leave reviews but I had to make an exception. She was very straight forward with the facts and gave me her honest opinion about my personal situation. At the end everything turned out well and it was worth every penny. I would recommend her to anyone that's looking for an honest and trustworthy attorney and not just an attorney looking for a payday.

I am absolutely blown out of my mind!! A relative of mine recently had court and the judge informed my relative that they need to "file a motion" on their own. We left the courtroom only to be chased down by Ms. Ruth Orange. She hands my relative a handwritten page and says "I wrote the motion for you. All you have to do is sign, date, and turn it in." I was shocked and said "Are you a lawyer?" She said "Yes I am." I said "And you didnt have to do all this?" And she said "No I didn't but I felt bad about the situation and want (my relative) to have a fair shot." We thanked her and she said she had to get back to the courtroom for her clients but she turned around and said "My name is Ruth Orange." We again thanked her.

All Im saying is that if this is something she would do for someone who isn't her client, I can only imagine what she would do for someone who is her paying client. You can tell that she enjoys being an attorney and shows very much empathy for others. You really do not find many people like her in the justice system. If I ever need legal representation in the future, Ms. Orange will be the obvious choice.

I engaged her services for my divorce and auto accident, both occurring within a month of each other in the summer of 2021. Regrettably, her performance was severely lacking. Despite initial impressions, she failed to fulfill her duties, resulting in significant financial losses on my part.

Communication was a major issue; she frequently ignored my attempts to contact her, and I even came close to missing court dates because of her lack of responsiveness. In the case of my auto accident, she strung me along for three years, falsely claiming that my case was pending while never actually filing a lawsuit despite my injuries.

Despite lodging complaints with the Florida Bar, no meaningful action has been taken. It's concerning to see someone like her continue to practice law without accountability.

I've spoken with other individuals who have had similar experiences with her, further confirming my concerns. Despite my efforts to seek redress, I've been unable to find resolution due to the perceived lack of seriousness by the Florida Bar.

Please, for your own sake, seek legal representation elsewhere. Ruth D Orange's behavior, including making false statements and neglecting her duties, is unacceptable.

Exercise caution and explore other options for legal assistance.

I am incredibly grateful for the opportunity to work with Erica for both my immigration and trust planning needs. From our first consultation, she demonstrated a profound understanding of the legal complexities involved. In my immigration case, Erica was proactive, responsive, and consistently kept me updated on the progress of my case. I felt fully supported throughout the entire process, and she took the time to explain my options in a way that made everything feel clear and manageable. Thanks to her hard work, I am now proudly holding my Resident card.

When it came to trust planning, I was initially unsure of where to start, but Erica walked me through the process with patience and care. She thoroughly explained everything, from the basics to the more intricate details of the law. She took the time to understand my unique situation and crafted a plan tailored to me and my family. The peace of mind I now have, knowing that my estate and assets are in order, is priceless.

What stands out most about Erica is her genuine care for her clients. She is not just a lawyer—she is someone who truly listens and is deeply committed to helping her clients achieve their goals. Erica is also assisting my husband, and she has been just as exceptional for him. I highly recommend Erica at Luque Law Firm to anyone seeking immigration or trust planning services.

Mr.Kuhl is very Professional and efficient. He will always take the time to listen to you and answer all your questions very detailed so you understand exactly what is going on. Quick responses to e-mails or telephone calls that are made too his office.

Ryan was quick to understand all the complexities of my case.  At every point in the process, he was thinking multiple steps ahead of everyone else.    His responsiveness to my questions and truthful/direct answers make him a great lawyer.

I highly recommend the Kuhl Law Firm.  Ryan Kuhl is absolutely a great lawyer.  Not only is Mr. Kuhl professional and knowledgeable, but he obviously has earned a tremendous amount of respect from his peers and colleagues in legal system.  After my personal experience with Mr. Kuhl, there is absolutely no doubt that he puts the best interest of the client first.

Ryan Kuhl is an attorney you can trust to understand your difficult situation and best represent you legally.  Ryan Kuhl is a well known and well respected attorney whose competence and compassion will get results for you.

Ryan Kuhl is a top-notch trial attorney. Bright, compassionate, and dedicated, Ryan will fight and fight hard for your rights! He will return your phone calls, speak to you with respect, and make sure you understand every stage of the litigation process. I whole-heartedly recommend Ryan Kuhl.

I have known Ryan for years.  He is a fantastic, ethical, hard-working attorney.  I have referred multiple colleagues, patients, and friends to Ryan over the years and I have received nothing but positive feedback.
It is great to know a trustworthy attorney you can call if you every need one.
Highly recommend.
Jesse Haven, MD

Pitkin Law Firm went above and beyond for me. Maria and Jerry, treated me with respect, communicated clearly, and worked hard on my behalf. The team at Pitkin Law takes pride in their work and genuinely cares about their clients. I couldn’t have asked for better representation.

I want to take a moment to recognize Maria for her exceptional professionalism, accuracy, and dedication throughout my legal accident case. From the very beginning, she made everything easy to understand and ensured that I was informed every step of the way. Maria was always responsive, patient, and willing to answer any questions I had, which truly helped ease the stress of the process. Her attention to detail and genuine care made a difficult situation much more manageable. I am extremely grateful for her support and highly recommend Maria and the Pitkin Law Firm to anyone in need of reliable, knowledgeable, and compassionate legal representation.

I am a retired former practicing plaintiff's personal injury attorney from Missouri who hired Jerry Pitkin to handle my personal injury claim arising out of an automobile collision in Naples. I was warmly and professionally welcomed by Jerry and his staff into his office.  During the course of his representation of me I was so greatly impressed by Jerry's knowledge of the law, grasp of the complex legal and medical issues of my case as well his compassion and understanding.  His entire staff, especially Maria his paralegal, were also as good as there is.  My case settled very favorably after some difficult and determined negotiations by Jerry.  I was very fortunate to find him and would highly recommend  to you.  I have, in fact, recommended him to my friends.

I’ve had the pleasure of working side by side with Maria Rissell, and she is truly an exceptional paralegal. Her attention to detail, strong follow-up, and genuine care for clients make her stand out. Maria consistently goes above and beyond to ensure every case is handled with professionalism and compassion. Anyone who works with her can feel confident they’re in excellent hands!

Maria is the best. As an insurance adjuster I deal with a lot of weird attorney offices, but Maria has made this the best most pleasant experience. Maria is attentive, soft spoken, and very respectful. My client is not even her client and we both have a great level of respect for both parties and a genuine concern. Really great service from Maria, this reflects greatly on the Pitkin Law Firm.
Jerry and Maria really helped me out and gave a understanding of every step . Their work really saved me from an accident and put me back where I needed to be.

Please BEWARE of a lady name Maria. She can be snappy, rude and unprofessional. She gets irritated just when questions are asked to further understand things in their lingo. In my experience, there’s no care in her voice whatsoever. Tread lightly with her.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello,
We take all feedback seriously and are disappointed to hear about your experience. However, we’re unable to locate any record of your interaction with our office or with Maria. At Pitkin Law, we strive to treat every client with respect, care, and professionalism. We would appreciate the opportunity to learn more and address your concerns directly.
Please contact our office at (239)-438-114 so that we can better understand what occurred and make things right.

reviews.text: Jerry and his team put me in the best position for a fair compensation when I was in a car accident and suffered multiple injuries. I trust Pitkin Law like no other firm as they're local to my home town, family owned and operated, with the best of the best.
Extremely happy with Pitkin Law they made the process easy and kept me updated every step of the way! I Highly recommend them !
Great team at Pitkin Law Maria was fantastic to work with and very helpful and knowledgeable. Thank you team Pitkin for resolving my case very quickly and without any hassle.

The Best Experience I have ever had.
Very Knowledgeable & Staff is Awesome!
Jerry Pitkin is one of the honest Lawyers,
who really care. They went above and beyond for me. Treated me like family .
Thank you....
Jerry went far above and beyond my expectations as my attorney. As he worked dilligently as my attorney he has  become my friend. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a good attorney.
Thank you for all the help you gave me and thank you for everything @pitkin law
Jerry is one of the best attorneys to have on your corner when dealing with auto accidents. He helped me every step of the way and was always friendly and informative

Best experience I ever had with an accident attorney. Communication skills are excellent they always answer your calls and are very straight forward .they performed and outstanding job on my case and went above and beyond to make sure I was satisfied! Don’t walk to Pitkin law run to Pitkin law with any accidental suit

Appreciate the work of Mr. Pitkin and his staff.  They were responsive when I had questions and helpful when it came to navigating the matter with opposing parties.  Would seek Mr. Pitkin's services again without hesitation.

Pitkin Law’s representation is Unmatched. The easiest and most efficient group to work with, Karina, Angela, Jerry all treated me as if i was family within the matter. The results they concluded for me were MUCH bigger than my expectations. They are all SUPERSTARS. Would not have had it any other way and i hope the same goes for anyone else needing representation. Don’t miss working with the Best here at Pitkin Law!

Angela helped me step by step I’m so impressed and glad I contacted Pitkin law firm. They will fight with you all the way and guide you. They said yes we can help when other firms will tell you right off the bat we can’t help you since you are at fault. I recommend them to my friend and family.

What an amazing law firm! I have never been into an accident before and was referred to Jerry and Karina by a client of mine. They treated me in a manner where I felt like they really cared about me! If I ever had a question, they would always get back to me in a timely manner. They fought super hard for me and got me a great settlement! No complaints! Thank you Pitkin Law!

Angela Cisneros THANK YOU!
There are no words that can describe the excellent service we received from this firm, especially from Angie. She was so dedicated and professional and we truly appreciate her.  The network of doctors and specialists this firm works with, treats you like family and they handle our case in a timely manner.

This law firm is extremely professional and really show you that they care about you and your case. Everyone is dedicated to you and your case.
Mr Pitkin is an amazing attorney, Karina,  Yanielis and the rest are just incredible..If you ever need their services don't they will be there for you.
Their professionalism and dedication to their clients makes them an outstanding group of individuals to work with. Thank you for all your help!

They were amazing! Efficient and had great communication!

All of my questions and concerns were answered and I am extremely pleased.

My first time getting into an accident I was completely lost and had no idea what to do, a family friend referred me to Karina! Calling her was the best choice I made after my accident. She helped me get through this difficult time in my life and explained everything to the smallest detail as it was my first accident. Very sincere and kind woman, she showed so much concern for my well-being and my daughters who was also in the accident with me. Even after these happenings she told me I could always contact her if I ever had any questions or concerns! If I could give her more than 5 starts I most definitely would! 1,000% recommend!!!!!
I've had a great experience with this Law firm. They fought for what I deserve. they kept me aware of all progress and went above and beyond in their Professional help

Karina has been so great to work with.  She is always available any time I call and explains everything so well.  Mr. Pitkin even gave me is personal cell phone number to reach him after hours.  They are a great law firm and make you feel like a person not just a number.

Best law firm hands down! Karina and everyone else in the office was absolutely amazing. Beyond patient, professional and they’re going to make sure you receive every penny that you deserve. I’d recommend this firm to every family member and friend possible. Cant fully put into words how this firm changed my life forever.

Thank you once again Karina!!!

I couldn’t have asked for a better law firm. I will always recommend them to anyone involved in a motor vehicle accident. They get straight to the point and have everything in great detail. They’re the kindest and sweetest people who understand everything and get what you need want and deserve. Thank you Pitkin Law for everything you do and are doing and have done.

The Staff at Pitkin Law are wonderful. Karina handled my case and kept me informed every step of the way. She made sure that I was satisfied with the way my case was being handled, and never pressured me to just settle. I would highly recommend this firm, and if needed would use them in the future.
Everything this office did for me was unbelievable. I highly recommend the Pitkin Law offices.

I’ve personally used this law firm and I’m very pleased with the high quality in which they have delivered there services. At all times they were attentive, communication flowed smoothly, and they always kept me up to date with everything involving my case.

This Law Firm is, way ahead of..
Anything in second place!!
# ☝
Thank you for everything, I'm very happy with how you treat your customers... You are professional and the best
Very helpful and very satisfied with their work!

My elderly mother had questions about an experience she has been  going through. which was not related to the kind of cases this office normally handles.     Karina  listened patiently  and answered our questions. and gave us the feedback we needed to guide us to the next steps to handle our situation. Thank you Karina!
Great people at Pitkin Law ! They listen and guide you thru your issues to make it so much easier on you. You won't be disappointed.

Outshines the “big name” law firms hands down!!  My case was a small one and was turned down by the tv-advertised lawyers. Pitkin Law treated me with kindness, dignity, and respect. Everyone in the firm works together on the case. They acted immediately and positively and accomplished in a few weeks what the other lawyers couldn’t do in months. Phone calls were returned immediately and even my ridiculous questions were answered with kindness and patience. They will be my lawyers for life!!  I can’t express how grateful I am to this wonderful law firm.
Amazing experience, Jerry and his team were incredible we are very grateful for them.

Hands down the best law firm out there. They stuck with me through a very difficult case and exceeded all of my expectations.

Jerry, Karina and the entire team at Pitkin Law are professional, knowledgeable, compassionate and treat you like family.

I highly recommend this firm.

You are in the best possible hands with Pitkin Law!
Jerry is the most dedicated and well researched attorneys in the state of Florida.  These gentlemen are knowledgeable and can help people in many areas of the law.
